name: Winder Launcher
description: A compact ripcord-style launcher included with starter sets.
assessment: The standard Winder Launcher provides reliable right-spin launches and is ideal for beginners.

name: String Launcher
description: A string-pull launcher for strong, consistent right- and left-spin launches.
assessment: The String Launcher delivers more power and supports both spin directions, making it a popular upgrade.

name: Custom Launcher
description: A modular launcher used with the Custom Line system.
assessment: The Custom Launcher is designed for the CX system and allows interchangeable components.
